case_title: DIANE GREEN VS. JOYCE REBHUN*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY*****

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
REPLY TO OPPOS TO MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY DEFENDANT REBHUN, JOYCE JD MBA PHD

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOYCE REBHUN'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY IS GRANTED. (CCP 395(A), 397(A).) (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS OF THE RULING.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JOYCE REBHUN'S MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 16, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. THE PARTIES MUST COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 17, 2013 AT 4:00 P.M. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
ORDER ; STIPULATION AND ORDER TO CONTINUE HEARING ON MOTION TO TRANSFER ACTION TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY

THE MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 21, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANTHONY B. GORDON OF GORDON & GORDON, TEL. NO. (818) 887-5155 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER .

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOYCE REBHUN's Motion To Transfer Action is Granted. (CCP 395(a), 397(a).) The contract was entered into in Los Angeles County. " 'The law is that a contract made by telephone is entered into at the place where the recipient of the call is at the time he accepts the offer. [Citation.]" (Wilson v. Scannavino (1958) 159 Cal.App.2d 369, 371. See Weil & Brown, 3:502.) In December 2010, Plaintiff contacted Defendant by telephone seeking legal representation, and Defendant accepted. (Rehbun Decl., 3, Green Decl., 3.) Defendant, who is the only named defendant, resides in Los Angeles County. There is no evidence to support that the contract was to be performed in San Francisco County. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/EHG

Notice Of Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Oct-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ANTHONY GORDON, ESQ., 818.887.5155, FOR DEFENDANT JOYCE REBHUN; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOYCE REBHUN's Motion To Transfer Action is continued to October 28, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 21, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the moving and opposition papers. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Of Motion To Transfer Action
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT JOYCE REBHUN'S Motion To Transfer Action is continued to October 16, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 pursuant to the stipulation of the parties. The parties must comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver a courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 17, 2013 at 4:00 p.m. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
